channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Americans celebrate Juneteenth as Obama’s presidential center opens to the public
item.description: As people gathered to celebrate Juneteenth at events across the U.S., former President Barack Obama and former first lady Michelle Obama welcomed the first visitors to his presidential center.

item.title: Barack and Michelle Obama surprise first visitors to newly opened presidential center
How a congressional redistricting battle could gain new life for the 2028 elections
